name: Penta Teknoloji Urunleri Dagitim Ticaret A.S.
summary: Penta Teknoloji Urunleri Dagitim Ticaret A.S. engages in the distribution of technology products in Turkey. It offers personal computers, PC components, peripherals and accessories, software, server-storage and networking products, and documentation solutions. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
